title: What Is JavaScript?
description: The magical language that makes web pages move!

scenes.speech: Hello! Today, let's learn JavaScript together — the language that powers the web!
scenes.title: Welcome to JavaScript!

scenes.speech: JavaScript is the language that makes web pages move and react!
scenes.title: The Language of Interactive Web Pages
scenes.content: Buttons, games, animations, and popups on the web often run with JavaScript. Web trio: HTML + CSS + JS!

scenes.speech: You can use console.log to show messages for testing and debugging!
scenes.title: Try console.log
scenes.content: Open the browser developer tools and you will see the message there. That's how developers check their code!

scenes.speech: let and const are two ways to store data in JavaScript!
scenes.title: Variables: let and const
scenes.content: Use 'let' for data that changes, 'const' for data that stays fixed. Clear names make your code readable!

scenes.speech: Functions are like recipes. You can reuse them again and again!
scenes.title: Functions = Magic Recipes
scenes.content: Write a function once, call it many times! This keeps your code clean and reduces mistakes.

scenes.speech: DOM manipulation lets JavaScript change what's on the web page directly!
scenes.title: DOM Manipulation
scenes.content: Change text, swap colors, add elements — JavaScript makes websites dynamic and interactive!

scenes.speech: Event listeners make websites respond to user actions like clicks!
scenes.title: Events = User Actions
scenes.content: Click a button, move a mouse, press a key — these are all 'events' that JavaScript can respond to!

scenes.speech: Arrays are lists of values stored in one variable!
scenes.title: Arrays = Data Collections
scenes.content: Arrays let you store multiple values at once. Access them by index number starting from 0!

scenes.speech: Modern JavaScript has powerful features used by the world's biggest websites!
scenes.title: JavaScript in the Real World
scenes.content: Facebook, YouTube, Twitter — almost every major website uses JavaScript. It's one of the most in-demand skills!
scenes.highlight: 📱 Web Apps  🎮 Browser Games  🤖 Node.js Servers

scenes.speech: Nice work! You took your first big step into JavaScript! Keep building!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
